Install bittensor-burn-message (do not pick a .whl by hand).

Cloned repo: copy these .whl files into dist/, then from repo root:
  python scripts/install.py
  pip install bittensor-burn-message --no-index --find-links dist

Standalone folder: cd into this folder, then:
  pip install bittensor-burn-message --no-index --find-links .

pip selects the wheel for your OS, CPU, and Python version automatically.
Then run:  bittensor-burn-message install --help
